antigen.notes: Immune checkpoint + TAA, overexpressed in ~70% of breast / ovarian / endometrial tumours with restricted normal-tissue expression. Anchor program: AZD8205 / puxitatug samrotecan (AstraZeneca topoisomerase-I ADC, Phase 2). Mersana XMT-1660 and FivePrime/Genentech FPA150 round out the ADC tier. Tests the tracker on a target where the B7-family naming overlaps with B7-H3 (CD276) — aliases must be specific (VTCN1, B7H4, B7x, B7S1), and bare "B7" is NOT an alias.
